dashboard.strategy_title: Ingamba zawe zo kwinjiza amafaranga uyu munsi
dashboard.strategy_desc: Uzuza imirimo yawe ya buri munsi kugira ngo ukomeze umuvuduko wawe. Buri bibazo byemejwe bituma winjiza $0.20 ku mafaranga yawe. Reba videwo zifite inyungu nyinshi kugira ngo ufungure ibihembo bidasanzwe.

videos.title: Guhitamo ibyo kwinjiza
videos.desc: Reba inyigisho zateguwe kugira ngo winjize umutungo wa dijitari. Porotokore yacu yemeza umwanya wawe n'ubwenge bwawe.

wallet.title: Ihuriro ry'imari
wallet.desc: Gunga umutungo wawe wemejwe. Kurikirana buri jambo ryose ryinjijwe kandi utangire gusohora amafaranga neza.
wallet.activate_desc: Tangira konti yawe wishyura $1.00 rimwe gusa (Protocol Fee).
wallet.transfer_desc: Hindura amafaranga asanzwe mu mafaranga y'imikino (Tokens).
wallet.deposit_desc: Shyira amafaranga kuri konti yawe ukoresheje uburyo bwo hanze bwizewe.
wallet.deposit_success: Kwinjiza muli Network byatangiye! Tegereza ko byemezwa.

games.title: Ingamba z'imikino y'amafaranga
games.desc: Gira uruhare mu mikino y'amahirwe kugira ngo ukube inshuro nyinshi amafaranga yawe yemejwe.

tour.welcome_desc: Ubu bufasha buzayobora mu bintu by'ingenzi by'incamake yawe yo kwinjiza.
tour.balances_desc: Kurikirana amafaranga asanzwe (ayo usohora) n'amafaranga y'imikino (ayo ukina) ako kanya.
tour.tasks_desc: Uzuza ibibazo kandi urebe videwo buri munsi kugira ngo winjize byinshi kandi ukomeze umuvuduko wawe.
tour.activity_desc: Buri gikorwa cyose gito cyandikwa mu gitabo cyacu kigaragara kugira ngo uze kugisuzuma.

hero.desc: Iburyo bwizewe bw'inyungu ku mirimo y'ubwenge yemejwe. Uzuza isuzuma rya buri munsi kandi ufungure amafaranga menshi.

features.work_desc: Uburyo bwacu bwemeza ko ari umuntu nyawe ukora imirimo y'ubwenge muri buri gikorwa.
features.yield_desc: Imirimo ya buri munsi yateguwe kugira ngo itange inyungu nyinshi ku mwanya wawe muri GMT+2.
features.liquid_desc: Sohora amafaranga ako kanya iyo ugeze kuri $5 byemejwe na network.
